name: Chicken Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
2. Mix with the soup, chili, salsa, and tapioca.
3. Line the bottom of a crockpot with three corn tortillas, torn into bite-sized pieces.
4. Add one-third of the chicken mixture.
5. Sprinkle with one-third of the onion and one-third of the cheese.
6. Repeat layers of tortillas topped with chicken mixture, onions, and cheese.
7. Cover and cook on LOW for 6 to 8 hours or HIGH for 3 hours.
8. Garnish with black olives before serving.
